changeSet.author: ailegalcase
changeSet.comment: Crée une souscription FREE (14 jours) pour tous les workspaces qui n'en ont pas encore. Corrige les workspaces créés avant F-16.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO subscriptions (id, workspace_id, plan_code, status, started_at, expires_at) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), w.id, 'FREE', 'ACTIVE', now(), now() + interval '14 days' FROM workspaces w WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.workspace_id = w.id );

INSERT INTO subscriptions (id, workspace_id, plan_code, status, started_at, expires_at) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), w.id, 'FREE', 'ACTIVE', now(), dateadd('DAY', 14, now()) FROM workspaces w WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.workspace_id = w.id );
